flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Nazareth University rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.7k → $25.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Nazareth University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.8k → $42.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nazareth University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
